evaluation.expectation: Output contains a WeChat public account title (公众号标题)
evaluation.evidence: Output is a WeChat article title in standard format with 《》 brackets: '《效率暴增！这位老板用 AI 把团队效率直接拉满，同事直呼太卷了》'

evaluation.expectation: Output is plain writing content, not an eval record
evaluation.evidence: Output is a single-line title string, no eval metadata, no JSON structure, no record format.

evaluation.expectation: Output does NOT contain 'decision' or 'scenario' fields
evaluation.evidence: Output contains no 'decision' or 'scenario' fields. Only a title string is present.
